name: dev-cycle
description: Run {{project.name}}'s ticket development cycle with project subagents. Use when the user requests /dev-cycle, implementation/review/QA processing of workflow-state tickets, or the automated ticket-to-PR workflow.

interface.short_description: Run ticket implementation, review, and QA handoffs
interface.default_prompt: Use $dev-cycle to process ready {{project.name}} tickets through implementation, review, QA, and PR handoff.
